description: Knowledge base for pixel-art creative work. Each topic is a structured JSON document the MCP can serve via get_reference(topic) and Claude can consume to make better art decisions.

topics.name: Pixel art principles
topics.description: Hue shift, jaggies, banding, AA clusters, edge bevels, process order. Slynyrd + Saint11 + Pedro Medeiros distilled.

topics.name: Sprite size conventions
topics.description: Tile / character / portrait / UI sizes per era and genre. Project VN specific recommendations.

topics.name: Color theory
topics.description: Harmonies (complementary, analogous, triadic, etc), hue shift table, temperature, narrative color associations.

topics.name: Easing curves (Penner)
topics.description: 25 standard easing functions with formulas, feel descriptions, use cases, pixel-art minimum frame counts.

topics.name: Dither guidance
topics.description: Decision tree for picking the right dither approach. Common recipes (skin gradient, AI image conversion, scanlines, water).

topics.name: Animation principles
topics.description: 12 Disney principles adapted for low-res pixel art. Frame economy, shape keys, hold frames, palette swap states.
